name: Mediterranean-Style Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: New Dieter's Cookbook
Preparation Time: 1:00
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Spray a 10-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray and preheat over medium heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and brown for 10 to 15 minutes, turning occasionally until evenly browned on all sides.
4. Add undrained tomatoes, wine, sugar, basil, garlic, and bay leaf to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover the skillet. Simmer for about 35 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. Transfer the chicken to another dish to keep warm.
7. In a small bowl, stir together water and cornstarch.
8. Stir the mixture into the tomato sauce in the skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
9. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes.
10. Serve the chicken with the sauce over cooked spaghetti.
11. Garnish with olives if desired.
